title: The two oil pipelines helping Saudi Arabia and UAE bypass the Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: Saudi Arabia’s East-West pipeline and the UAE's Abu Dhabi Crude Oil Pipeline are thought to be able to help partially offset the Strait of Hormuz blockage.
summary_public: Saudi Arabia’s East-West pipeline and the UAE's Abu Dhabi Crude Oil Pipeline are thought to be able to help partially offset the Strait of Hormuz blockage.

SA.label: neutral
SA.evidence: oil pipelines helping Saudi Arabia and UAE bypass the Strait of Hormuz
